mapper.sql: id, client_id, balance, created, create_id, updated, update_id, is_delete, extend1, extend2, extend3
mapper.select:
select
from client_balance where client_id = #{clientId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 0 limit 1

select
from client_balance where is_delete = 0 order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into client_balance ( id, client_id, balance, created, create_id, updated, update_id, is_delete ) values ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clientId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{initBalance,jdbcType=BIGINT}, now(), #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, now(), #{operatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, 0 )
